text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What incredible strength! Narita Brian wins the
Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the crowd goes wild! The Kyoto Racecourse
erupts in celebration!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I was able to win the Kikuka Sho with no
problems.
choice_data_list: You've really come a long way.
You've really come a long way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, I think so too. This past year—no, ever
since my debut...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, hooold on just a minute!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to be wrappin' things up! What are
you two thinkin'?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's right, it's me! Now, come over here a sec,
would ya.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So, the time has come for us to fulfill that
promise. Eh, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You didn't come all this way just so we could pat
each other on the back and call it quits, didja?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. This level of success is hardly
enough to satisfy me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So I'll see you in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian comes back to the waiting room with
some pep in her step, looking quite pleased.
